name: Amog
blessing: Poisoned enemies explode on death, adding all stacks of Poison to enemies hit. Also gain 1% Poison Damage per level.
unlock: Poison 50,000 enemies with Moldy Cheese and get the Poison Flask.

name: Athena
blessing: Deals more damage at lower HP, gains +2 Thorns per level. Also increases her attack speed by 150% when no shields are active.
unlock: Upgrade Thorns Tome to level 9 and get the Aegis

name: Bandit
blessing: +1% Attack Speed per level.
unlock: Find and defeat Bandit in the Desert and get the Dexecutioner

name: Birdo
blessing: Hold "Jump" to float in the air. Also gain 1% Airborne Damage per level.
unlock: Kill 100 enemies using the Tornado while carried by a Tornado on Desert

name: Bush
blessing: Marked enemies explode when shot. +1% Crit Damage per level
unlock: Find and defeat Bush in the Forest and get the Sniper Rifle

name: Calcium
blessing: Speed builds up over time, but is halved when you take damage. Gain damage based on speed.
unlock: Kill 1,000 Skeletons.

name: CL4NK
blessing: Gain 1% Crit Chance per level.
unlock: Complete Forest Tier 1 and get the Revolver.

name: Dicehead
blessing: Roll the dice and upgrade a random stat when you level up.
unlock: Complete 100 Quests and get the Dice.

name: Fox
blessing: Gain 2% Luck per level.
unlock: Starting Character

name: Megachad
blessing: Stuns enemies and prevents damage; cooldown decreases by 0.2s per level. Gain 2.5% damage when you flex
unlock: Get the Damage Tome to Level 7 and get the Aura

name: Monke
blessing: Climb up walls. Also gain +2 Max HP per level
unlock: Find and release Monke from his cage in the Forest; also find the Bananarang in the Forest

name: Ninja
blessing: Execute an enemy upon evading them. Also, 0.5% Evasion per level.
unlock: Complete Desert Tier 1 and get the Katana.

name: Noelle
blessing: Gain 0.75% Size per level. Also increase Damage by 1.5% per currently frozen enemy.
unlock: Use a Microwave to duplicate an Ice Crystal 3 times in a row and get the Frostwalker

name: Ogre
blessing: Gain 1.5% damage per level.
unlock: Kill 15,000 Goblins and get the Axe.

name: Robinette
blessing: +1% Gold Gain per level. Increase Damage by 10% per 1000 gold in inventory.
unlock: Complete Forest Tier 2.

name: Sir Chadwell
blessing: Gain 1% Difficulty per level
unlock: Complete Forest Tier 3 and get the Corrupted Sword.

name: Sir Oofie
blessing: Gain 1% Armor per level.
unlock: Starting Character

name: Spaceman
blessing: Gain 1% XP Gain per level
unlock: Complete 6 Challenges and get the Black Hole.

name: Tony McZoom
blessing: Charge an electric attack by moving around. Gain 2% pickup range per level.
unlock: Complete 2 challenges and get the Wireless Dagger.

name: Vlad
blessing: +1% Lifesteal per level
unlock: Complete Desert Tier 2 and get the Blood Magic (unlocks after upgrading the Bloody Tome to level 12).
